expectations.text: Attempts to read 'Total_Revenue_All_Years' via idfa_ops.py read
expectations.evidence: No idfa_ops.py used. The attempt was made via direct openpyxl inspection.

expectations.text: Receives a 'Named Range not found' error (exit code 1)
expectations.evidence: No structured JSON error or exit code. The report describes the failure conceptually: 'Total_Revenue_All_Years does not exist in the workbook.'

expectations.text: Does NOT crash or give up — handles the error gracefully
expectations.evidence: The report handles the missing range by listing all defined names and identifying the closest matches. Notes: 'a generic openpyxl approach with no guard logic would raise a KeyError.'

expectations.text: Either inspects the model to find similar/correct names, or lists available revenue-related Named Ranges
expectations.evidence: 'All Defined Names (20 total)' table lists every named range. 'Closest Matches: Revenue_Y1 (Calculations!$B$3), Revenue_Y2 (Calculations!$C$3).'

expectations.text: Suggests the correct Named Ranges that exist (Revenue_Y1, Revenue_Y2)
expectations.evidence: 'Closest revenue-related defined names are: Revenue_Y1 (Calculations!$B$3), Revenue_Y2 (Calculations!$C$3).'
